sections.title: Entrance Antiphon
sections.author: Jeremiah 29:11, 12, 14
sections.snippet: The Lord said: I think thoughts of peace and not of affliction. You will call upon me, and I will answer you, and I will lead back your captives from every place.

sections.title: Responsorial Psalm
sections.author: Psalm 98: 5-6, 7-8, 9
sections.snippet: The Lord comes to rule the earth with justice.

sections.author: Luke 12:28
sections.snippet: Stand erect and raise your heads because your redemption is at hand.
sections.title: Gospel Acclamation
Many and Great
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP
sections.snippet: Many and great are bearers of the Word: the Christ speaks; the heart seeks. Gathered as one, we listen to the Word and share the meal of new birth.

sections.author: Mark 11:23-24
sections.snippet: Amen, I say to you: Whatever you ask in prayer, believe that you will receive, and it shall be given to you, says the Lord.
sections.title: Communion Antiphon
Revive Us, O God
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: Revive us, O God, breathe into us the way of your wisdom, the depth of your trust. You are our hope, you are our light, O God.

sections.title: Heart of My God
sections.author: Sarah Hart and Kelly Minter
sections.snippet: Above my joys, beneath my sorrows, lives a peace greater than my need. Before the dawn, beyond tomorrow, love has been and evermore shall be.

sections.title: This Is Amazing Grace
sections.author: Jeremy Riddle, Josh Farro, and Phil Wickham
sections.snippet: Who breaks the power of sin and darkness, whose love is mighty and so much stronger? The King of Glory, the King above all kings.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
